reviews.review_description:
If you're a fan of wave shooters and on-rails action, then Warchasm could be the indie gem you're looking for. There are several areas to unlock, each with their own design and obstacles, and 3 stages in each to complete.
It can be quite energetic too with all the ducking and weaving you need to do when avoiding incoming fire or hazards.
Multiple special weapons to unlock as you progress too which adds some variety and if you're competitive then the game also has leaderboards where you can showcase your skills.
For fans of the genre it's worth checking out.

You can watch my first impressions gameplay over on my YouTube channel!
😁✌️☮️❤️
A really good, fun little game in the style of old rail shooters with multiple levels. Now in VR: cruise on a roller coaster and hunt for high scores with lots of firearms. 5 stars!

This is really fun indie rail shooter! You need to Dodge and Lean cart side to side.

Enemies are great and there is checkpoints. I really enjoy playing this one! It runs well and looks cool

reviews.review_title: Fun Shooter with room to grow
reviews.review_description: Definitely a fun little shooter with some cardio thrown in for good measure. Currently on sale and for some a demo is available. Might be light on content but the developer is updating it a lot with a major update that just St dropped.

It only took 1 level to become addicted! Great variety in the levels design helps build on the mechanics, and it felt great to flip the guns when I ran out of bullets. I didn't get any feelings of motion sickness and dodging the hazards is a fun addition. Only thing I'd love to see is some Quest Achievements to hunt, as I would be in this game for hours!

I played WARCHASM on steam a while back , But now it’s out on. Quest it’s a must have 
Fast paced Great Audio Great fun 

If you have a Quest you need this 

My Review  https://youtu.be/cm2YkadCCkY

reviews.review_title: A space shooter with a spooky aesthetic
reviews.review_description:
Man have I been waiting for this game to leave early access… I enjoyed the game back then and I still enjoy it now.  

So what is this game about?  Well let me ask you this… Do you remember going to Disney World and going on the Buzz Lightyear ride where the seats spin around because you control them? The ride was called Buzz Lightyear’s Astro Blasters, you shot at aliens to rack up some points and the ride would conclude itself with a boss battle against Zerg who just flies around trying to avoid your lasers.

Warchasm is exactly like the Buzz Lightyear ride in VR, except the tone is darker and the aesthetic is much creepier, especially if you’re like me and you play all of your VR games with the music turned off.  Don’t worry, this is not a horror game, you’re only inside of a mine cart that is progressively exploring an alien world, you’re constantly going through a black void although you can see the walls around you, and you’re waiting for whatever alien robot is flying around trying to kill you, only to inevitably get shot down.  If you have played Gazzlers, this game is no different aside from the somber tone.

Supposedly the game is still being developed, meaning we are getting bigger bosses and whatnot, but the bosses as I am writing this review are essentially shooting galleries, you stop in your tracks and you kill the remaining robots, and you unlock the next level.

If you want to play what feels like a roller coaster experience wit the shooting but you don’t care for the ‘roller coaster’ aspect , give this game a try.

reviews.review_title: Great game now I can play.
reviews.review_description: I had some issues at first which the developer was more than helpful to resolve and it ended up just needing a reinstall but the developer was awesome and I think it's a fun game now so my review score went from 1 to 5 cos now it doesn't crash and it was just a buggy install obviously. But you need the right seating arrangement I think.

reviews.review_title: WOW! It’s made for me!! AWESOME!
reviews.review_description: Wonderful game! Cool mechanics, consistent style, it's got its own groovy atmosphere! I like the level of detail - scratched guns, spinning wheelbarrow wheels. In general the whole game reminds me of the games of my childhood, only now in VR! No motion sickness, everything is good. Recommended!

reviews.review_title: Fun game and a slight workout
reviews.review_description: WARCHASM is a fun rail shooter game where you have to move your body to avoid obstacles and shoot at droids and mechs in an alien environment. You can use shields and upgrade your weapons as you go. I like the way you have to move around it turned out to be a slight workout without it feeling that way.

reviews.review_title: I actually like it!! Very cool!
reviews.review_description: Great game for all ages and types of gamers. Bullet hell on rails (literally) first person arcade shooter. Solo shooting, no zombies, great graphics/scenery, music, and increasingly challenging levels. Comfort level: NO motion sickness. This game should be in the Meta Quest Store by now. Great price: get it while you can.
Amazing game easy to play. I highly recommend this game if you are just getting into the VR world. Or if you are an avid game player. You will be very happy you made this purchase.

A bit short but it does support bhaptics.  
25% off if needed: vr.miketunes.com/war

reviews.review_title: Amazing to play in a beanbag chair
reviews.review_description:
Ride a minecart tilting your body left and right avoiding stuff, I admit I didn't really think this way anything special at first beyond being well made technically. Then I decided to play it on my bean bag chair which allowed for amazing freedom to move my body and it quickly felt like I was sitting in a minecart for real. If you have the right kind of seating this game is seriously a great time. 

Featured in Oculus Quest Seated Games Video - https://youtu.be/Naxha7wgbDQ

Remember the mine cart scene from Indiana Jones?
Swap Indy with Han Solo and that's Warchasm!

This game has it all! Great shooting, great leaning/dodging and a killer soundtrack.

You get a good workout while dodging lasers, debris on the tracks and some well placed doors.

This game is one of my go to games when I have 20 mins to quick play something.

There is no locomotion to worry about and the game looks great and runs smooth on the Quest 2.

Every world is varied and has great surprises in store!

Pj
VR Verdict Podcast
You can catch an interview with the dev on our 78th episode. 
It's available in audio or video format where you can see us discuss in game assets in VR.

https://youtu.be/CeC8NBp7-pQ

https://www.podbean.com/ew/pb-gk52y-10a112f

This game is freaking brilliant! It's so much fun it's like beatsabar but way better and with guns, spaceships, droids, freaking lava(!!!) there's so many baddies and obstacles it's great, keeps you on your toes. The motion is really smooth and reactive,  when you play either seated or standing. It gets pretty fast paced too, its quite a workout. 
I could play this all day, I played it for an hour straight on my first go. The music is really brilliant and fits the retro tone of the game well, love the lazer guns! It's like a roller-coaster shoot-em-up!
Nice Game. I play all Levels. I hope it comes more

I'm not sure how but the dev has managed to make the game look and run even better on quest, fantastic job. Given this or pistol whip I'd rather play this game every time, I just have more fun playing warchasm
Lots of fun.
Omg this game is a blast, and an amazing work out.  I will be playing this one a lot.
